title: carex alpina var. holostoma
intro: Carex alpina var. holostoma, also known as Alpine Sedge, is a plant species that belongs to the sedge family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Carex alpina var. holostama include anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which are attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic compounds. This plant has several health benefits, including the treatment of kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and inflammation, as well as the ability to help lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Carex alpina var. holostama is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
